name: Compiler Optimization Removal or Modification of Security-critical Code
description: The compiler optimizes away security-critical code (such as memory scrubbing or overflow checks) that appears unused from an optimization perspective but serves essential security purposes.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL(source_code) contains security-critical TRANSFORM (memory clearing, overflow check) that compiler removes during optimization, leaving STORAGE(sensitive_data) unprotected without META(volatile/optimization_barrier) preventing removal
